# retrieveConnectedPeripherals(withServices:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a list of the peripherals connected to the system whose services match a given set of criteria.

## Declaration

```swift
func retrieveConnectedPeripherals(withServices serviceUUIDs: [CBUUID]) -> [CBPeripheral]
```

## Parameters

- **serviceUUIDs**: A list of service UUIDs, represented by [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBUUID] objects.

## Return Value

A list of the peripherals that are currently connected to the system and that contain any of the services specified in the `serviceUUID` parameter.

## Discussion

The list of connected peripherals can include those that other apps have connected. You need to connect these peripherals locally using the [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCentralManager/connect(_:options:)] method before using them.

## Retrieving Lists of Peripherals

- **retrievePeripherals(withIdentifiers:)**: Returns a list of known peripherals by their identifiers.
